pr.title: MAR-318 reviewer agent regression tests
pr.body:
## Linked Linear Issue

Closes: MAR-318

## Role / Type / Risk / Validation

- Role: role:test
- Type: type:test
- Risk: risk:low
- Validation profile: validation:test

## Summary

- Adds mocked regression coverage.

## Files Changed

- test/reviewerEvidence.test.js

## Tests Run

- node --test test/reviewerEvidence.test.js
- npm test
- npm run build
- npm run lint

## Manual QA

- Confirmed tests use mocks and fixtures only.

## Broad Scan Reason

- No broad scan was used.

## Conflict Risk

- Low; test-only changes.

## Acceptance Labels

- Merge label: none
- Reviewer label: none
- Human gate: approved in MAR-311

## PR Readiness

- Draft allowed reason, if Draft: n/a
- Paired-review candidate: yes
- Auto-merge candidate: no

## Visible UI Expectation

- No visible UI changes.

## Known Limitations

- Live OpenAI and GitHub credentials are not used in CI.

pr_acceptance: Paired-review PRs must be open, non-draft, unmerged, and have required checks and metadata ready before reviewer approval.
reviewer_app_authority: Reviewer App identity is limited to PR inspection, PR comments, and PR review submission.
context_economy: Do not send or collect the whole repo by default.
validation: validation:test requires targeted test command if relevant, npm test, npm run build, and npm run lint.
